reference: I have been experiencing pain in the middle of my chest, extending to the bottom of my throat when I breathe. It has been constant but getting stronger. It feels like an anxiety attack or as if someone is applying pressure to the bottom of my throat. I am twenty-eight years old and weigh about two hundred and fifty pounds. What could this be?
text: I have been experiencing pain in the middle of my chest, extending to the bottom of my throat when I breathe. It has been constant, but getting stronger. It feels like an anxiety attack, or as if someone is applying pressure to the bottom of my throat. I am 28 years old and weigh about 250 pounds. What could this be?
